expectations.text: Response detects bun as package manager
expectations.evidence: Install command uses 'bun add -D wrangler @cloudflare/vite-plugin'. Build and deploy commands use 'bun run build' and 'bun run deploy'.

Mentions TanStack Start in the title and imports tanstackStart from '@tanstack/react-start/plugin/vite' in the vite.config.ts example. However, does not configure viteEnvironment: { name: "ssr" } which is required for TanStack Start SSR.

Creates apps/web/wrangler.jsonc with $schema, name, compatibility_date, compatibility_flags: ["nodejs_compat"], and observability. However, omits the 'main' field pointing to TanStack Start server entry.

expectations.text: Response adds cloudflare() plugin to vite.config.ts
expectations.evidence: Shows importing cloudflare from '@cloudflare/vite-plugin' and adding cloudflare() to the plugins array. However, does not pass the required viteEnvironment: { name: "ssr" } parameter needed for TanStack Start.

expectations.text: Response adds deploy script to package.json
expectations.evidence: Shows adding 'deploy': 'wrangler deploy' to apps/web/package.json scripts alongside dev and build scripts.
